LabelEn: 1)Solar water pumping systems for irrigation and aquaculture,
LabelSw: Mifumo ya kusukuma maji kwa nishati ya jua kwa ajili ya umwagiliaji na ufugaji wa samaki.

LabelEn: 2)Solar-powered irrigation systems, including drip and sprinkler,
LabelSw: Mifumo ya umwagiliaji inayotumia nishati ya jua, ikijumuisha umwagiliaji wa matone (drip irrigation) na wa kunyunyizia maji (sprinkler irrigation).

LabelEn: 3)Solar-powered agro-processing machines, including milling and oil extraction,
LabelSw: Mashine za usindikaji wa mazao zinazotumia nishati ya jua, ikijumuisha kusaga na kukamua mafuta.

LabelEn: 4)Solar dryers for crops, fruits, spices and fish,
LabelSw: Vikaushio vya mazao, matunda, viungo na samaki vinavyotumia nishati ya jua.

LabelEn: 5)Solar cold rooms, refrigeration and ice-making systems,
LabelSw: Maghala baridi, mifumo ya jokofu na utengenezaji wa barafu inayotumia nishati ya jua.

LabelEn: 6)Solar-powered aquaculture systems, including aeration, pumping and hatchery support,
LabelSw: Mifumo ya ufugaji wa samaki inayotumia nishati ya jua, ikijumuisha uingizaji hewa majini (aeration), usukumiaji wa maji na usaidizi wa mazalia ya samaki (hatcheries).
Vituo vya kushushia samaki na miundombinu mingine ya uzalishaji inayotumia nishati ya jua.

LabelEn: 8)Biogas digesters and biogas-powered cooking or processing systems,
LabelSw: Mitambo ya kuzalisha biogesi na mifumo ya kupikia au kuchakata inayotumia biogesi.

LabelEn: 9)Biomass energy systems using rice husks, bagasse and agro-waste,
LabelSw: Mifumo ya nishati ya biomasi inayotumia maganda ya mpunga, mabaki ya miwa (bagasse) na taka za mazao ya kilimo.
Mota za umeme, pampu na vikandamizi hewa (compressors) vyenye ufanisi mkubwa wa matumizi ya nishati.

LabelEn: 11)Energy-efficient agro-processing equipment, including milling, oil press, dairy and fish processing,
LabelSw: Vifaa vya usindikaji wa mazao vyenye ufanisi mkubwa wa matumizi ya nishati, ikijumuisha mashine za kusaga, kukamua mafuta, kusindika maziwa na kusindika samaki.
Vifaa vya jokofu, kupoza na kuhifadhi mazao vyenye ufanisi mkubwa wa matumizi ya nishati.
